## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. e.g. "Adds 5 backend questions on caching" or "Fixes the complexity note on tencent #46". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Content fix (correction/clarification to an existing entry)
- [ ] New content (questions, answers, mock interview)
- [ ] Translation (`*.zh.md`)
- [ ] Tooling / docs / site
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] Entries follow the `### N. Question` schema and are contiguously numbered.
- [ ] If I edited a company file, algorithm/coding entries have `**Tags:**` and complexity.
- [ ] If applicable, I updated the matching `*.zh.md` mirror (aligned by entry number).
- [ ] I ran `python tools/build_index.py` and committed the refreshed `docs/questions.json`.
- [ ] I ran `python tools/validate.py` and resolved any errors/warnings.
- [ ] No proprietary or confidential material; only publicly known questions.
